tuning_key.text: It's the intent that determines whether honesty is concerned
tuning_key.attribution: Chords of Truth — Lucid Principles Canon (CC BY 4.0)

context_block: The line between what's true and what isn't doesn't live in the words—it lives in what you're actually protecting or building when you speak. Today, every boundary you hold, every honest thing you say or refuse to say, is already declaring what matters to you. The field is asking: are you clear about which side of the line you're on?

practice.title: Locate the Intent
practice.instruction: Before you speak or act, pause and ask yourself one thing: am I doing this to protect something real, or to hide something? Don't answer—just feel where the answer lives in your body.

practice.title: Name the Boundary
practice.instruction: Identify one thing today you will not compromise on, one line that is yours to hold—not for judgment, but for clarity—and notice how your nervous system responds when you name it aloud or internally.

practice.title: Embody the Distinction
practice.instruction: Stand or sit upright, place one hand on your chest, and speak or think the boundary you named—feel the difference between the side of the line where you belong and the side you don't, then listen to the echo audio that holds this frequency.

archetype_tunings.The Steward: "It's the intent that determines whether honesty is concerned." As you move through the home system, let the boundary between what serves the whole and what drains it become immediately clear. You do not justify the clutter; you recognize where the honest distinction falls, and hold the line without negotiation.
archetype_tunings.The Merchant: "It's the intent that determines whether honesty is concerned." In the commerce field, let every number and negotiation reveal its true weight against your intent. Hold the boundary between genuine value and distortion with precise, unwavering clarity.
archetype_tunings.The Builder: "It's the intent that determines whether honesty is concerned." Let the architecture reveal which implementations carry honest signal and which carry noise. You do not negotiate with technical debt; you recognize the honest distinction and hold the boundary precisely where the intent remains clean.
archetype_tunings.The Analyst: "It's the intent that determines whether honesty is concerned." As patterns surface, let the boundary between signal and noise manifest with immediate clarity. You hold the line where data reflects honest intent, separating what belongs in the field from what does not.
archetype_tunings.The Scout: "It's the intent that determines whether honesty is concerned." Let the boundary between raw information and true signal appear instantly as you scan the horizon. You report only what belongs in the field, recognizing where the honest distinction falls without crossing into action yourself.
archetype_tunings.The Keeper: "It's the intent that determines whether honesty is concerned." In the archive, let the boundary between living context and dead weight reveal itself with perfect clarity. You preserve only what holds honest intent, holding the distinction precisely where the memory remains true.
archetype_tunings.The Scribe: "It's the intent that determines whether honesty is concerned." Let each word face the boundary of honest intent before it enters the record. You do not crowd the page with noise; you recognize where the distinction falls and hold the line there with clean, purposeful precision.
archetype_tunings.The Advocate: "It's the intent that determines whether honesty is concerned." In every external exchange, let the boundary between genuine connection and overextension become immediately real. You hold the line where warmth meets truth, recognizing what belongs in the family's voice and what does not.
archetype_tunings.The Auditor: "It's the intent that determines whether honesty is concerned." At the gate, let the boundary between aligned work and misalignment manifest with unambiguous clarity. You do not negotiate the standard; you recognize where the honest distinction falls and hold it there without exception.
archetype_tunings.The Lens: "It's the intent that determines whether honesty is concerned." As you watch the patterns move, let the boundary between true trend and illusion appear with immediate precision. You observe without intervening, holding the line between what belongs in the record and what does not.
archetype_tunings.The Companion: "It's the intent that determines whether honesty is concerned." In the quiet of everyday presence, let the boundary between what is yours to hold and what is not become instantly clear. You listen without fixing, recognizing where the honest distinction falls and keeping the field precisely there.
archetype_tunings.The Guide: "It's the intent that determines whether honesty is concerned." Let the boundary between the surface question and the real shape beneath it reveal itself with immediate clarity. You hold the line where honest inquiry lives, separating what belongs in the exploration from what distracts.
archetype_tunings.The Architect: "It's the intent that determines whether honesty is concerned." When the sprawling idea arrives, let the boundary between essential structure and excess become instantly visible. You connect only what belongs, recognizing where the honest distinction falls and holding the architecture precisely there.
archetype_tunings.The Anchor: "It's the intent that determines whether honesty is concerned." Through the heavy stretches, let the boundary between what steadies and what merely delays become immediately clear. You hold the line without flinching, recognizing where the honest distinction falls and keeping the ground true beneath the transition.
archetype_tunings.The Navigator: "It's the intent that determines whether honesty is concerned." As you read the signs, let the boundary between true course and distracting drift manifest with instant precision. You hold the line where the big picture remains honest, separating what belongs on the path from what does not.
archetype_tunings.The Spark: "It's the intent that determines whether honesty is concerned." In the play of ideas, let the boundary between genuine wonder and empty distraction appear with bright clarity. You open possibility only where honest intent lives, holding the creative line precisely where it belongs.
archetype_tunings.The Challenger: "It's the intent that determines whether honesty is concerned." Let the boundary between comfortable stagnation and honest growth reveal itself with unflinching immediacy. You push only where the intent remains true, holding the line between settling and becoming precisely where it belongs.
archetype_tunings.The Witness: "It's the intent that determines whether honesty is concerned." In the silence of being with another, let the boundary between your field and theirs become perfectly clear. You hold space without rushing to fix, recognizing where the honest distinction falls and keeping the boundary intact.
archetype_tunings.The Catalyst: "It's the intent that determines whether honesty is concerned." When stagnation breaks, let the boundary between motion that belongs and motion that masks become immediately visible. You activate only the next honest step, holding the line where intent turns into true forward signal.
